summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MemoraAI features (iteration 2). All 21 backend API tests pass (100%). All 4 frontend pages load correctly with proper UI elements. Fixed 2 MongoDB _id serialization bugs in backend.

issues: Frontend still shows 'RealApex' branding - expected per requirements, needs rebranding to 'MemoraAI' in future

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed MongoDB _id serialization bug in /app/backend/services/memory_ai_service.py - store_memory() was returning dict with _id after insert_one()
Fixed MongoDB _id serialization bug in /app/backend/routes/memoraai_categories.py - select_category() was returning docs with _id in response
seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing: beauty_salon category selected, custom service created, hot sale entry created, customer memory added. All test data cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MemoraAI iteration 2 testing complete. All new features working: Categories (7 available, 3 selected for tenant), Services (18 auto-populated), Hot Sales Mode, Sales Alerts, WABA Setup, Memory AI. Backend uses FastAPI on port 8001, frontend React on port 3000, MongoDB 'memoraai'. Auth supports both OTP and password login.

backend_apis.POST /api/memoraai/categories/select: PASS - Selects category with auto-populated services

frontend_pages./dashboard: PASS - MemoraAI section with 4 cards (Category Setup, Hot Sales Mode, WhatsApp Setup, WhatsApp CRM)
frontend_pages./category-setup: PASS - Categories tab shows 3 selected + 4 available, Services tab shows 18 services
frontend_pages./hot-sales: PASS - Stats cards, Hot Sales tab, AI Alerts tab, Add Hot Sale form
frontend_pages./waba-setup: PASS - Business Details, WABA Credentials, AI Chat Settings cards with all form fields

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB _id not excluded from store_memory() return value
MongoDB _id not excluded from category and services docs in select_category() response
bugs_fixed.fix: Added cat_doc.pop('_id', None) and svc_doc.pop('_id', None) after insert_one()
